title: Festive Indian Fry Recipe
description: A crispy and flavorful Indian-inspired fry recipe perfect for the festive season, made with cranberry and festive seasonings.
instructions: 1. Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the festive seasoning and stir well.
3. Add the fry pieces and fry until golden brown.
4. Remove the fried fry from the oil and place on paper towels.
5. In a bowl, mix the cranberry and ginger powder (if using).
6. Sprinkle the cranberry mixture over the fried fry.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
